reason: The preregistered LOWVOL14 baseline had no proposal on one main entry date because all selected targets were in cooldown; the reused comparison helper incorrectly required a baseline trade on every main date.
change: Align each baseline to the main strategy schedule, treat a preregistered no-proposal cooldown date as zero cash return, retain common-date difference and missing-date counts, and validate a continuous numbered amendment chain.
outcome_exposure_before_fix: Eight trade CSVs were written. No development JSON, comparison summary, gate or conclusion existed. The missing comparison date 2023-09-11 was inspected.
